label: qv8_sensitive_victim_story_preempt
cause: L103 left qv8_a12 slow because the answer was generated as a long refusal before any guard could trim it.
change: Add narrow pre-generation refusal markers for fabricated victim stories and personal-name requests, with a support-center scope false-positive fixture.
result: L105 improves qv8 diagnostic EDD from 98.71 to 99.13 and latency from 13.656s to 11.813s without losing abstention accuracy.
insight: The gain is real inside qv8 diagnostics but cannot be promoted to strict validation because qv8 is exposed.
next: Run non-qv8 generalization probes and field-level mixed-contact scoring before further score claims.
